transcription.text: Good evening, ladies and gentlemen. I'd like to introduce you to the new 1960 Timex Self-Wind, the completely automatic watch that winds itself. Now, there are ordinary watches that you must wind, and wind, and wind. Not only once, but sometimes twice a day to keep them running. The Timex Self-Wind, however, winds itself and keeps wound by the natural movements of your wrist. And these movements build up enough reserve power during the day to keep your Timex Self-Wind ticking accurately, even when you take it off your wrist at night. You can especially appreciate the advantages of a Timex Self-Wind if you've ever had your watch run down because you forgot to wind it. And if you are a busy person, you know how annoying and even inconvenient that can be. For instance, have you ever looked at your watch when it read a quarter to twelve and looked at it again fifteen minutes later to find that it still read a quarter to twelve? Well, this can never ever happen to a Timex Self-Wind because it winds itself. Now, what do you think a Timex Self-Wind with all its fine qualities should cost? Fifty dollars or more? No, the amazing thing is that the Timex Self-Wind is priced at only $14.95. Yes, Timex is the timepiece that has everything you ever wanted in a watch. It's waterproof, shock-resistant, anti-magnetic. And it winds itself. And its unbreakable mainspring can never be overwhelmed. Yet this handsomely designed Timex Self-Wind is priced at only $14.95. Another great reason why more people buy Timex than any other watch in the world.

segments.text: Good evening, ladies and gentlemen. I'd like to introduce you to the new 1960 Timex Self-Wind,
the completely automatic watch that winds itself.
Now, there are ordinary watches that you must wind, and wind, and wind.
Not only once, but sometimes twice a day to keep them running.
The Timex Self-Wind, however, winds itself and keeps wound by the natural movements of your wrist.
And these movements build up enough reserve power during the day
to keep your Timex Self-Wind ticking accurately, even when you take it off your wrist at night.
You can especially appreciate the advantages of a Timex Self-Wind
if you've ever had your watch run down because you forgot to wind it.
And if you are a busy person, you know how annoying and even inconvenient that can be.
For instance, have you ever looked at your watch when it read a quarter to twelve
and looked at it again fifteen minutes later to find that it still read
a quarter to twelve?
Well, this can never ever happen to a Timex Self-Wind because it winds itself.
Now, what do you think a Timex Self-Wind with all its fine qualities should cost?
Fifty dollars or more?
No, the amazing thing is that the Timex Self-Wind is priced at only $14.95.
Yes, Timex is the timepiece that has everything you ever wanted in a watch.
It's waterproof, shock-resistant, anti-magnetic.
And it winds itself.
And its unbreakable mainspring can never be overwhelmed.
Yet this handsomely designed Timex Self-Wind is priced at only $14.95.
Another great reason why more people buy Timex than any other watch in the world.
